Home/Assistant Activity

Assistant Activities

Where collaboration, learning, and innovation grow together.

The laboratory assistants are the backbone of daily operations in the Telecommunication Network Laboratory. Beyond supporting research and practicum sessions, assistants also participate in internal programs that foster teamwork, leadership, and professional growth.

Activities Overview

The Assistant Activity program is divided into 7 main events that run throughout the academic year each designed to strengthen technical skills, build character, and nurture the community spirit of the laboratory team.

1.

Open House Laboratory

Opening Doors to Innovation

Every semester, the Telecommunication Network Laboratory welcomes students and visitors to explore our facilities, projects, and research achievements. The open house aims to promote awareness of telecommunication technologies and inspire new members to join the assistantship program.

2.

Open Registration for Assistants

Be Part of the Innovation

Assistant registration is open at the start of each semester for students who wish to gain real-world laboratory experience. Candidates go through a selection process focusing on academic performance, technical skill, and teamwork potential.

 

3.

Assistant Internalization Program

Building Knowledge, Values, and Team Spirit

This program is designed to introduce new assistants to the laboratory’s values, culture, and operational standards. Through interactive workshops and mentoring sessions, participants learn about teamwork, professionalism, and research ethics.

 

4.

Gathering Night

Strengthening Bonds Beyond the Laboratory

“Malam Keakraban” or Gathering Night is a fun-filled bonding event where assistants, lecturers, and alumni connect in an informal setting. The event includes games, storytelling, and performances that strengthen the family spirit of the Telecommunication Network Laboratory.

5.

Bincang Bareng Wisuda

Sharing Journeys, Inspiring Futures

“Bincang Bareng Wisuda” (BinBarShow) is a talk-show-style event featuring graduating assistants and alumni who share their academic and career experiences. It serves as a motivational platform for active assistants and younger students to prepare for professional life after university.

6.

Buka Bersama

Unity in the Holy Month of Ramadan

During the holy month of Ramadan, the laboratory holds an annual “Buka Bersama” (Iftar Gathering) event. Assistants, lecturers, and alumni come together to share meals, gratitude, and stories fostering unity and compassion within the academic community.

 

7.

TNL Mart

Creativity Meets Entrepreneurship

TNL Mart (Telecommunication Network Lab Mart) is a student-led initiative run by assistants to develop entrepreneurial and management skills. The mart offers merchandise, stationery, and lab-themed products while promoting sustainable operations.

Telecommunication Network Laboratory,
Department of Electrical Engineering, ITS
